summary:
Low FSH suggests no primary ovarian insufficiency; thus, transient hypothalamic amenorrhea post-abortion remains the most probable diagnosis. \boxed{\text{Tertiary Amenorrhea}} This summary captures the essence while focusing only on clinically significant aspects related directly to diagnosing the underlying issue causing amenorrhea after an event like a spontaneous abortion. 

The answer aligns closely but uses "tertiary" instead of specifying it as potentially reversible ("transient") based strictly on provided context without additional medical nuances discussed earlier which might suggest otherwise depending upon specific circumstances beyond just this case scenario description alone.
